landing.subtitle: Protect your business with automated security testing. Discover vulnerabilities before attackers do.
landing.feature1Desc: Fast security check in 2-5 minutes. SSL, headers, ports, and basic vulnerability detection.
landing.feature2Desc: Comprehensive vulnerability assessment with Nuclei. Subdomain enumeration, CMS checks, and more.
landing.feature3Desc: AI-generated reports in plain language. Actionable insights for business owners and developers.
